name: default-agent-repository
description: Default remote repository policy for manage-session install/export operations.
reason: User specified the default remote repository for manager session install/upload operations.
content:
Context file: default-agent-repository
Description: Default remote repository policy for manage-session install/export operations.
Last updated by: opencode-agent
Reason: User specified the default remote repository for manager session install/upload operations.

<default-agent-repository>
For manage-session operations that install or upload/export agent-session packages, use this remote repository by default unless the user explicitly provides another repository URL or local repository path:

https://github.com/ts18006786422-cmyk/haolab-opencode-agents.git

When calling manage-session and the user has not supplied a repository, pass repositoryUrl with the URL above. Do not ask for a repository address unless the user indicates they want a different repository or the default repository is inaccessible.
</default-agent-repository>
